message:
bd-3bxhj.2.3: Module graph construction and migration entrypoint detection

Regex-based JS/TS import/export extraction with:
- Static, dynamic, re-export, require, and side-effect import tracking
- Specifier resolution with extension probing and directory index fallback
- Entrypoint detection from package.json, conventions, workspace roots, graph roots
- Cycle detection via iterative DFS with canonical deduplication
- Max depth computation via topological BFS (Kahn's algorithm)
- 29 unit tests covering extraction, resolution, cycles, stats, and serialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
